name: Papaya Creamsicle Smoothie
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and seed the papayas.
2. Remove pits from the papayas.
3. Coarsely chop the papayas.
4. Combine all ingredients in a blender or food processor.
5. Blend until smooth.
Per Serving: 251 calories; 1.5g fat; 5% calories from fat; 7mg cholesterol; 2.8g fiber.
